Package net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    Cabin
    A representation of the model object 'Cabin'
    CabinFactory
    The Factory for the model.
    CabinPackage
    The Package for the model.
    CabinPackage.Literals
    Defines literals for the meta objects that represent each class, each feature of each class, each operation of each class, each enum, and each data type
    CrewMember
    A representation of the model object 'Crew Member'
    CrewSeat
    A representation of the model object 'Crew Seat'
    Curtain
    A representation of the model object 'Curtain'
    Door
    A representation of the model object 'Door'
    Galley
    A representation of the model object 'Galley'
    Lavatory
    A representation of the model object 'Lavatory'
    LuggageProperties
    A representation of the model object 'Luggage Properties'
    Passenger
    A representation of the model object 'Passenger'
    PassengerProperties
    A representation of the model object 'Passenger Properties'
    PhysicalObject
    A representation of the model object 'Physical Object'
    Result
    A representation of the model object 'Result'
    Row
    A representation of the model object 'Row'
    Seat
    A representation of the model object 'Seat'
    SimulationProperties
    A representation of the model object 'Simulation Properties'
    SimulationResult
    A representation of the model object 'Simulation Result'
    Stairway
    A representation of the model object 'Stairway'
    Stowage
    A representation of the model object 'Stowage'
    TravelClass
    A representation of the model object 'Travel Class'
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Activator
    The Class Activator.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    AircraftType
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Aircraft Type', and utility methods for working with them
    ClassType
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Class Type', and utility methods for working with them
    DoorOption
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Door Option', and utility methods for working with them
    ExitType
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Exit Type', and utility methods for working with them
    LayoutConcept
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Layout Concept', and utility methods for working with them
    LuggageSize
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Luggage Size', and utility methods for working with them
    ObjectOption
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Object Option', and utility methods for working with them
    PassengerMood
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Passenger Mood', and utility methods for working with them
    SeatType
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Seat Type', and utility methods for working with them
    Sex
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Sex', and utility methods for working with them
    SortingStyle
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Sorting Style', and utility methods for working with them
    StairwayDirection
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Stairway Direction', and utility methods for working with them
    TravelOption
    A representation of the literals of the enumeration 'Travel Option', and utility methods for working with them
